result.reason: Implement import functionality for MobaXTerm .moba files to enhance user migration and interoperability. This involves creating a new deserializer for the .moba format.
result.approach: Create a new `MobaXTermConnectionDeserializer.cs` within `mRemoteNG/Config/Serializers/ConnectionSerializers/MobaXTerm` to parse .moba files and convert them into mRemoteNG connection objects. Integrate this deserializer into the existing connection import mechanism, possibly by modifying `ConnectionsConfigManager.cs` to recognize and handle .moba files.
